eyebrow: HeadyEx · AI Economy Exchange · Coming Q4 2026
headline: Trade the Building Blocks of AI.
subheadline: HeadyEx is the exchange layer of the Heady AI economy — a marketplace where enterprises, developers, and data teams buy, sell, and trade the fundamental resources that power intelligent systems: API credits, embedding compute, vector storage, GPU burst capacity, data streams, and agent labor.
body: As AI workloads scale, the ability to source compute efficiently and trade excess capacity becomes a competitive advantage. HeadyEx creates a transparent, metered marketplace for AI resources — with real-time pricing, multi-provider settlement, and usage analytics that give data teams the visibility to optimize spend and maximize utilization across the Heady ecosystem and beyond.

badge.text: Planned · Join the waitlist for Observer tier access

disclaimer: HeadyEx is a computational resource credit exchange. Not a financial, securities, or cryptocurrency exchange.
